project_type: C++ desktop AI assistant with REPL interface
build_system: Makefile with clang++ (single compilation unit via #include chain from mk_entry.cpp)
test_framework: Custom test framework in tests/test_main.cpp using TEST_ASSERT macros and RUN_TEST
verification_instructions: 1. Run make to build mk_os binary. 2. Run make test to run the test suite. Both must pass with exit code 0.
setup_instructions: The project requires clang++ with C++17, libcurl, and libsqlite3. Build with 'make' from MK_OS/ directory.
environment_constraints: Network is available for cloning/pushing. Build requires libcurl and libsqlite3 headers.
contribution_requirements: Push to a new branch and create a PR against main.
key_patterns: All .cpp files use header guards (#ifndef). Files are included directly via #include in mk_entry.cpp (single compilation unit pattern). Each module is a class defined in a single .cpp file. The test file independently includes only the modules it tests.
directory_structure: MK_os-2/MK_OS/ is the main project root. system/ has mk_entry.cpp (main entry). ai_core/ has smart_router, conversation_mode, input_preprocessor, math_solver. mk_brain/personality/ has casual_responses, response_style, personality_core. tests/ has test_main.cpp.
